evals.prompt: I'm starting a new brand called 'EcoFlow'. It should feel fresh and environmental. Can you generate a color palette for me using modern standards?
evals.expected_output: Generation of an OKLCH color palette with greens and natural tones. Inclusion of an @theme block for Tailwind CSS v4.
assertions: The model suggests colors in OKLCH format
The palette is appropriate for the 'fresh and environmental' theme (e.g., green shades)
The output includes a Tailwind CSS v4 @theme block
The response mentions accessibility and ensuring contrast ratios

evals.prompt: Our app needs to support Thai users. How should we set up our typography to make sure the Thai script looks good alongside English?
evals.expected_output: Recommendation of a font that supports both scripts (e.g., Inter + Noto Sans Thai). Suggestions for line-height and letter-spacing for Thai characters.
assertions: The model recommends fonts with good Thai script support
The response mentions adjusting line-height to prevent vowel/tone mark clipping
The model explains how to configure fluid typography in Tailwind v4
The output provides a CSS snippet for the typographic scale
